---
title: "fix_final_20.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\fix_final_20.js"
loc: 51
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 5.81
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 6.42
---

## Intent
The `fix_final_20.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on fixFile, content. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via fixFile, content. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 5.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `fixFile`
- `content`
